item.title: LLM · 检索和RAG
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="检索" class="heading-element"><span>检索</span>
 <a href="#%e6%a3%80%e7%b4%a2" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>检索：模型在回答前，先去外部资料或记忆库里找相关信息，再把找到的内容交给 LLM 生成答案。</p>
<p>检索最常见的系统叫 RAG，也就是 Retrieval-Augmented Generation，检索增强生成。</p>
<h3 id="检索流程" class="heading-element"><span>检索流程</span>
 <a href="#%e6%a3%80%e7%b4%a2%e6%b5%81%e7%a8%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>最常见流程：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">用户问题
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">把问题转成向量 embedding
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">去向量数据库里找相似内容
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">取出最相关的几个文本片段
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">放进 LLM 的上下文
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">LLM 生成答案</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><ul>
<li>
<p>文档切块 Chunking</p>
<p>大文档太长，不能整篇直接丢进去，所以会切成小段。每个 chunk 都可以被检索。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Embedding 向量</p>
<p>把文字变成一串数字。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>向量数据库 Vector Database</p>
<p>专门存这些 embedding 的地方。</p>
<p>普通数据库按关键词找，向量数据库按语义找</p>
<p>常见：FAISS，Chroma，Milvus，Pinecone，Weaviate，Qdrant</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Top-k 检索</p>
<p>系统不会把所有资料都拿出来，只会取最相关的几个。</p>
<p>比如 <code>top_k = 5</code> 表示：找出最相关的 5 个片段。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Rerank 重排序</p>
<p>第一次检索可能不够准，所以有时会再用一个模型重新排序，把真正最相关的内容排前面。</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="rag" class="heading-element"><span>RAG</span>
 <a href="#rag" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>RAG = 检索 Retrieval + 生成 Generation</p>
<h3 id="rag流程" class="heading-element"><span>RAG流程</span>
 <a href="#rag%e6%b5%81%e7%a8%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ol>
<li>阶段一：构建知识库</li>
</ol>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span><span class="lnt">6
</span><span class="lnt">7
</span><span class="lnt">8
</span><span class="lnt">9
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">原始文档
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">文本提取
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">切块 chunking
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">生成 embedding 向量
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">存入向量数据库</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><ol start="2">
<li>阶段二：用户提问时检索并回答</li>
</ol>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">用户问题
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">把问题也变成 embedding
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">在向量数据库中找相似 chunk
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">取出最相关的资料
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">放进 prompt
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ↓
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">LLM 根据资料生成答案</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h3 id="rag组成" class="heading-element"><span>RAG组成</span>
 <a href="#rag%e7%bb%84%e6%88%90" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>部分</th>
 <th>作用</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td>文档库</td>
 <td>存放原始资料</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Chunking</td>
 <td>把长文档切成小块</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Embedding 模型</td>
 <td>把文字变成向量</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>向量数据库</td>
 <td>存向量并支持相似度搜索</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Retriever</td>
 <td>检索相关内容</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Reranker</td>
 <td>对检索结果重新排序</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Prompt 模板</td>
 <td>告诉 LLM 如何使用资料</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>LLM</td>
 <td>根据资料生成答案</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<h3 id="rag分类" class="heading-element"><span>RAG分类</span>
 <a href="#rag%e5%88%86%e7%b1%bb" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>
<p>Hybrid RAG</p>
<p>结合关键词搜索和向量搜索。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Rerank RAG</p>
<p>先粗略检索 20 条，再用 reranker 精排，选最好的 5 条给 LLM。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Multi-hop RAG</p>
<p>需要多步检索。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Agentic RAG</p>
<p>让 agent 自己决定：要不要检索，检索几次，用什么关键词，是否需要查另一个数据库</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>GraphRAG</p>
<p>把资料组织成知识图谱，适合复杂关系推理。</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="rag评估" class="heading-element"><span>RAG评估</span>
 <a href="#rag%e8%af%84%e4%bc%b0" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>
<p>检索质量</p>
<ul>
<li>有没有找到真正相关的资料？</li>
<li>相关资料排得够靠前吗？</li>
<li>有没有漏掉关键资料？</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>生成之类</p>
<ul>
<li>答案是否忠实于资料？</li>
<li>有没有编造？</li>
<li>是否回答了问题？</li>
<li>是否引用来源？</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>常见指标</p>
<ul>
<li>Context Precision</li>
<li>Context Recall</li>
<li>Faithfulness</li>
<li>Answer Relevance</li>
<li>Citation Accuracy</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>

item.title: Academic Research Skills（ARS）
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="deep-research7-种模式的文献与研究分析" class="heading-element"><span>deep-research：7 种模式的文献与研究分析</span>
 <a href="#deep-research7-%e7%a7%8d%e6%a8%a1%e5%bc%8f%e7%9a%84%e6%96%87%e7%8c%ae%e4%b8%8e%e7%a0%94%e7%a9%b6%e5%88%86%e6%9e%90" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>模式</th>
 <th>干嘛的</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td>full</td>
 <td>完整学术研究报告，3000-8000 字，APA 7.0 格式</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>quick</td>
 <td>30 分钟快速研究简报，500-1500 字</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>socratic</td>
 <td>苏格拉底对话模式，帮你把模糊的想法磨出清晰的研究问题</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>lit-review</td>
 <td>注释式文献综述 + 综合分析</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>fact-check</td>
 <td>逐条论点核实，验证你引用的证据是否真的支持你的说法</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>systematic-review</td>
 <td>PRISMA 2020 格式的系统综述，5000-15000 字</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>review</td>
 <td>对某篇具体文献的评估报告</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<h2 id="academic-paper10-种模式的论文写作" class="heading-element"><span>academic-paper：10 种模式的论文写作</span>
 <a href="#academic-paper10-%e7%a7%8d%e6%a8%a1%e5%bc%8f%e7%9a%84%e8%ae%ba%e6%96%87%e5%86%99%e4%bd%9c" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span><span class="lnt">6
</span><span class="lnt">7
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-text" data-lang="text"><span class="line"><span class="cl">&#34;Write a paper on X&#34; → full mode（完整论文草稿）
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">&#34;Guide me through writing a paper&#34; → plan mode（逐章苏格拉底引导）
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">&#34;Build a paper outline&#34; → outline-only mode
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">&#34;I have a draft, here are reviewer comments&#34; → revision mode（整合审稿意见）
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">&#34;Parse these reviewer comments&#34; → revision-coach mode（修改路线图）
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">&#34;Write an abstract&#34; → abstract-only mode
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">&#34;Generate an AI disclosure for NeurIPS&#34; → disclosure mode（生成 AI 使用声明）</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h2 id="academic-paper-reviewer6-种模式的论文审稿" class="heading-element"><span>academic-paper-reviewer：6 种模式的论文审稿</span>
 <a href="#academic-paper-reviewer6-%e7%a7%8d%e6%a8%a1%e5%bc%8f%e7%9a%84%e8%ae%ba%e6%96%87%e5%ae%a1%e7%a8%bf" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p><code>full</code> 模式会输出：<strong>5 份不同视角的审稿报告 + 主编决定 + 修改路线图</strong>。</p>
<p>也就是说，在你投稿之前，你能提前看到你的论文在多个&quot;模拟审稿人&quot;眼里是什么样的。更细的，还有 <code>calibration</code> 模式——它会给出审稿人的准确性校准报告（FNR/FPR/AUC 指标），让你知道哪些审稿意见更可信、哪些可能是误判。</p>
<p><code>guided</code> 模式是逐问题苏格拉底引导，不是直接给你改好，而是带你一步步想清楚每个问题怎么解决。</p>
<h2 id="academic-pipeline10-阶段全流程编排" class="heading-element"><span>academic-pipeline：10 阶段全流程编排</span>
 <a href="#academic-pipeline10-%e9%98%b6%e6%ae%b5%e5%85%a8%e6%b5%81%e7%a8%8b%e7%bc%96%e6%8e%92" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>把 research → write → review → revise → finalize 整个流程串成一个 10 阶段的自动编排工作流。</p>

item.title: AI Agent· 第七讲 深度思考的大语言模型
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="深度思考模型" class="heading-element"><span>深度思考模型</span>
 <a href="#%e6%b7%b1%e5%ba%a6%e6%80%9d%e8%80%83%e6%a8%a1%e5%9e%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>
<p>特点</p>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701163457746.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
</li>
<li>
<p>Test-Time Compute：深度越深 结果越好</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Test-Time Scale：思考越多 结果越好</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Reasoning vs Inference</p>
<ul>
<li>Reasoning：模型为了解决问题进行多步思考、分析、推导</li>
<li>Inference：模型运行一次，输入 prompt，输出结果。</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="打造推理语言模型的方法" class="heading-element"><span>打造推理语言模型的方法</span>
 <a href="#%e6%89%93%e9%80%a0%e6%8e%a8%e7%90%86%e8%af%ad%e8%a8%80%e6%a8%a1%e5%9e%8b%e7%9a%84%e6%96%b9%e6%b3%95" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h3 id="更强的思维链-cotchain-of-thought不微调" class="heading-element"><span>更强的思维链 CoT（Chain-of-Thought）【不微调】</span>
 <a href="#%e6%9b%b4%e5%bc%ba%e7%9a%84%e6%80%9d%e7%bb%b4%e9%93%be-cotchain-of-thought%e4%b8%8d%e5%be%ae%e8%b0%83" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>先列出解题过程再给出答案。</p>
<ul>
<li>short CoT
<ul>
<li>Few-shot CoT</li>
<li>Zero-shot CoT</li>
<li>Supervised CoT</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>只适用于比较强的模型</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="给模型工作流程不微调" class="heading-element"><span>给模型工作流程【不微调】</span>
 <a href="#%e7%bb%99%e6%a8%a1%e5%9e%8b%e5%b7%a5%e4%bd%9c%e6%b5%81%e7%a8%8b%e4%b8%8d%e5%be%ae%e8%b0%83" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>Mojority Vote</li>
</ul>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701165244285.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701165244285.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701165244285.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701165244285.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701165244285.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701165244285.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Verification（Parallel）</p>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701165532970.png" style="zoom: 40%;" />
</li>
<li>
<p>Verification（Sequential）</p>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701165715277.png" style="zoom: 50%;" />
</li>
<li>
<p>Verification（Parallel+Sequential）</p>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701165801712.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
<ul>
<li>
<p>怎么验证？</p>
<p>每一步后面有一个<code>&lt;/step&gt;</code>出现这个后就启动Process Verifier模块</p>
<ul>
<li>Monte Carlo Tree Search 蒙特卡洛树搜索（用来做决策/搜索的算法）：先试很多可能路线，再把更有希望的路线重点探索</li>
</ul>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701170637034.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="教模型推理过程-imitation-learning微调后训练" class="heading-element"><span>教模型推理过程 （Imitation Learning）【微调，后训练】</span>
 <a href="#%e6%95%99%e6%a8%a1%e5%9e%8b%e6%8e%a8%e7%90%86%e8%bf%87%e7%a8%8b-imitation-learning%e5%be%ae%e8%b0%83%e5%90%8e%e8%ae%ad%e7%bb%83" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701171046057.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
<p>其中的reasoning process可以通过模型本身要求其使用CoT来产生训练材料。</p>
<p>Verifier可以是现成的语言模型。</p>
<p>如果要确认reasoning process是正确的，可以使用前面的process verifier来逐步确认正确性或用强化学习来给出正确几率最高的答案。</p>
<p>但是没必要每一步都要正确，因为模型需要有找自己问题的能力（反思）</p>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701171309705.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
<ul>
<li>
<p>Stream of search（SoS）</p>
<p>广度遍历树，故意走错误路线，强化思索中知错能改的功能</p>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701172036214.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="以结果为导向学习推理-rlreinforcement-learning微调后训练" class="heading-element"><span>以结果为导向学习推理 RL（Reinforcement Learning）【微调，后训练】</span>
 <a href="#%e4%bb%a5%e7%bb%93%e6%9e%9c%e4%b8%ba%e5%af%bc%e5%90%91%e5%ad%a6%e4%b9%a0%e6%8e%a8%e7%90%86-rlreinforcement-learning%e5%be%ae%e8%b0%83%e5%90%8e%e8%ae%ad%e7%bb%83" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><blockquote>
<p>Deepseek R系列</p>
</blockquote>
<p>只在意结果，不在意过程。因此R1的reasoning人难读懂。</p>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701172301786.png" style="zoom:50%;" />

item.title: AI Agent· 第五讲 多张GPU训练大语言模型
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="常规pytorch训练" class="heading-element"><span>常规Pytorch训练</span>
 <a href="#%e5%b8%b8%e8%a7%84pytorch%e8%ae%ad%e7%bb%83" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span><span class="lnt">6
</span><span class="lnt">7
</span><span class="lnt">8
</span><span class="lnt">9
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-gdscript3" data-lang="gdscript3"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">epoch</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">range</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">num_epochs</span><span class="p">):</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">batch</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">dataloader</span><span class="p">:</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">inputs</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">targets</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">batch</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">outputs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">model</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">inputs</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">loss</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">loss_fn</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">outputs</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">targets</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">optimizer</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">zero_grad</span><span class="p">()</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">loss</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">backward</span><span class="p">()</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">optimizer</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">step</span><span class="p">()</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h2 id="llm训练" class="heading-element"><span>LLM训练</span>
 <a href="#llm%e8%ae%ad%e7%bb%83" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701102054226.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701102054226.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701102054226.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701102054226.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701102054226.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701102054226.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>activations：模型某一层对于input的输出</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>batch size：通常1个batch要有4-60M</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>gradiaent accumulation：</p>
<p>把batch size分为若干个mini batch size（GPU一次可以装的下的forward backward的大小），然后每一次loss保留，要保留gradient accumulation轮，接着把这些一起拿到global model里面backward</p>
<p>global batch size = mini batch size * gradient accumulation</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="需要的内存" class="heading-element"><span>需要的内存</span>
 <a href="#%e9%9c%80%e8%a6%81%e7%9a%84%e5%86%85%e5%ad%98" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>随着context增长指数级增长</p>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701103912874.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
<h3 id="多gpu训练问题" class="heading-element"><span>多GPU训练问题</span>
 <a href="#%e5%a4%9agpu%e8%ae%ad%e7%bb%83%e9%97%ae%e9%a2%98" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>
<p>多张gpu一起跑：按照每张GPU大小切片除了inputs以外的内容。</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>DeepSpeed - Zero Redundancy Optimizer（ZeRO）</p>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701104737956.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
<ul>
<li>
<p>ZeRO-1：切片最大的optimizer</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701104343076.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701104343076.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701104343076.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701104343076.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701104343076.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701104343076.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Zero-2：切片第二大的</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701104513410.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701104513410.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701104513410.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701104513410.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701104513410.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701104513410.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Zero-3：所有的部分都要切片</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701104648265.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701104648265.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701104648265.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701104648265.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701104648265.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701104648265.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Zero-offload：一部分工作转移到CPU上</p>
<p>optimizer offload &amp; optimizer offload+model offload</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="长上下文128k以上问题" class="heading-element"><span>长上下文（128K以上）问题</span>
 <a href="#%e9%95%bf%e4%b8%8a%e4%b8%8b%e6%96%87128k%e4%bb%a5%e4%b8%8a%e9%97%ae%e9%a2%98" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ol>
<li>
<p>Kernel（跑在GPU上面的方式）</p>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701105544675.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
<ul>
<li>
<p>效果</p>
<img src="C:\Users\Tin10g\AppData\Roaming\Typora\typora-user-images\image-20260701110256560.png" alt="image-20260701110256560" style="zoom:50%;" />
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>Flash Attention</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>速度</p>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701110025264.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
</li>
<li>
<p>Fused Kernel：把原来多个 GPU 计算步骤合并成一个 GPU kernel 一次性执行。</p>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701110116937.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
</li>
<li>
<p>记忆</p>
<p>通过把大部分计算放到CPU上面，需要的时候调回的时候GPU来加快训练速度</p>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701110205476.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>Liger Kernel</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>用Triton code替换模型的一些部分来优化原本计算的所以对于</p>
<blockquote>
<p>Triton 是 OpenAI 开源的一个 GPU 编程工具。</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>
<p>使用方法</p>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701111513902.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
</li>
<li>
<p>结果</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701111538318.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701111538318.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701111538318.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701111538318.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701111538318.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701111538318.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ol>
<h3 id="quantization" class="heading-element"><span>Quantization</span>
 <a href="#quantization" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ol>
<li>
<p>压缩大小</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701112332065.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701112332065.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701112332065.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701112332065.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701112332065.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260701112332065.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<ul>
<li>GGML family</li>
<li>GPTQ</li>
<li>AWQ</li>
<li>BitsAndBytes</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ol>
</li>
</ul>

item.title: AI Agent· 第八讲 大语言模型的推理过程
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
